texto: Great detectives are extremely rare. I believe they are the products of thousands of years of evolution. Their abilities to perceive and understand cannot be learned or taught. We can only wait for them to appear. It is unfortunate they are so few, and even more tragic that fewer still ever find their way into police work.
explicacao: Citação de Laurence Giliotti sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Great detectives are extremely rare.
